calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Patricia Henle, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Granada, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Anthony Davidauskis, also present.
Defendant: Anthony M. Ferracane, present in pro per.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Judgment for Plaintiff for restitutiona and possession of the property located at 1000 Sutter St., room #715, San Francisco.
Defendant to vacate on or before noon of Oct. 8, 2007.
Each to bear own fees and costs.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, Trial vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Comm. Sue Kaplan Dept.: 218 Clerk: Anna Redigonda

Matter comes on calendar for Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Patricia Henle appearing for Plaintiff.

Settlement Conference is ordered off calendar. No appearance by Defendant. Trial Date remains.
(not reported)
